title: K-200 Propulsion Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-406-A. Revision: A. Type: manual. Author: Nina Schulz. Created: 2024-11-15. Last modified: 2025-01-27. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1064.
